# alicloudextend_esa_sites (Data Source)

Lists all ESA sites under the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "alicloudextend_esa_sites" "existing" {}

output "sites" {
  value = data.alicloudextend_esa_sites.existing.sites
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `sites` (Attributes List) All ESA sites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sites))

<a id="nestedatt--sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sites`

Read-Only:

- `instance_id` (String) The bound rate plan instance ID.
- `site_id` (String) The numeric site ID.
- `site_name` (String) The domain name (e.g. example.com).
- `status` (String) The site status (e.g. active, pending, offline, moved).
